xiakexing_ai.description: XiaKeXing gameplay automation, smoke checks, regression tests, and maintenance validation for the XiaKeXing repository.
xiakexing_ai.summary: Repo-specific XiaKeXing gameplay automation and regression tooling.
xiakexing_ai.purpose: Use for XiaKeXing gameplay control, regression verification, bug reproduction, and maintenance checks.

relay.description: Relay rooms, threads, messages, and workflow-team coordination for multi-session collaboration.
relay.purpose: Use for room, thread, transcript, and workflow-team operations when explicit collaboration state is required.

filesystem.description: Filesystem access outside the default workspace, including directory listing, file reads, writes, edits, and metadata inspection.
filesystem.summary: Extended filesystem access beyond the current workspace.
filesystem.purpose: Use when the task needs file operations in allowed directories that are outside the current workspace root.

memory.description: Structured long-term knowledge graph memory for creating, reading, updating, and deleting entities, relations, and observations.
memory.purpose: Use for explicit knowledge graph storage and retrieval when graph entities and relations matter more than project history.

thinking.description: Sequential reasoning workspace for multi-step analysis, revisions, branching thought paths, and solution verification.
thinking.purpose: Use when a task benefits from structured reasoning, hypothesis testing, or careful revision of intermediate conclusions.

grep_app.description: Public GitHub code search and file retrieval for finding similar open-source implementations and examples.
grep_app.summary: Public GitHub code search and retrieval.
grep_app.purpose: Use for searching open-source repositories, finding similar implementations, and fetching matching files from GitHub.

context7.description: Current library and framework documentation lookup with API examples and targeted code snippets.
context7.summary: Up-to-date library and framework documentation search.
context7.purpose: Use for official docs, current APIs, and library-specific examples when external documentation is the source of truth.

fetch.description: Direct webpage fetching and lightweight content extraction from arbitrary URLs.
fetch.purpose: Use when you already have a URL and need to fetch page content directly without a more specialized external tool.

desktop_commander.description: Desktop process control, command execution, deep file inspection, and heavyweight local file analysis.
desktop_commander.summary: Advanced local process and filesystem operations.
desktop_commander.purpose: Use for process management, broader local file access, and heavier local analysis workflows than the default workspace tools.

evomemory.description: Persistent project history, decisions, governance assets, benchmark memory, and durable feedback reconciliation.
evomemory.purpose: Use for project memory lookup, durable corrections, governance context, historical decisions, and prior debugging or implementation context that may affect current work.
